failedAssertions.reason: Contract not met: expected Heart Rate baseline band behavior/opacity could not be validated because heart_rate baseline data was absent and rendered fill did not match <=15% baseline-band requirement.
Date click did not trigger navigation to Night detail view.
Insufficient-history behavior did not suppress baselines/deltas for a 10-point history window; API still emits computed baseline and full delta/direction fields.
API window is correct, but required frontend time-axis label rendering was not observed.
Night endpoint returns fixed UTC window (20:00Z to 08:00Z) and ignores timezone differences; requests with timezone params and different users produced identical time_range values.
Spanning workout annotation exists in API (recovery) but is excluded from night view overlap surface; Night UI has no marker at left edge.
Earliest-date boundary behavior does not match contract: backward navigation never disables at earliest data date.
Loading placeholder requirement was not met in observed delayed-fetch state (no skeleton/spinner surfaced).
Mobile viewport violates full-width expectation due reproducible horizontal overflow/horizontal scrolling.
Expected glucose + HR + hypnogram aligned on shared axis, but glucose and hypnogram visualization were not rendered.
Hypnogram stage differentiation/legend did not render on tested surface.
Required Sleep Latency delta badge is missing from SummaryStrip.
Current local night surface does not match S1 fixture expectations.
Assertion requires Body Temp Deviation sparkline; observed Sleep Score sparkline instead.
S3 fixture expectations are not met on current local surface.
Correlation card and share action are absent on the tested Trend UI state.
Monthly mode did not show monthly aggregation behavior required by the assertion.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Could not verify the specific 'Inngest job produced baselines' contract because local Inngest event delivery did not materialize metric_baselines rows despite 200 trigger responses.
Blocked by VAL-CROSS-008 failure (no date-click navigation path available).
Unable to create a truly expired token in-session (expires_in_days minimum is 1 day, no time-travel control, and raw tokens for historical expired grants are unavailable via API).
Blocked by unmet precondition: test runtime was outside an in-progress night window for the configured timezone/data.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated browser validation guidance to document sign-in redirect handling via __session cookie and fallback to curl artifacts when agent-browser request capture is empty.
